# DSP communication email template

: Vaibhav Arora
Created time: October 21, 2024 1:13 PM
Status: Done
Last edited: October 21, 2024 4:31 PM

# **What problem are we solving?**

NBFC will be sharing important communications to the user triggered by certain events that occur in the user’s loan account. The communication should follow a template (for ease of perusal and identification of content by the user)

List of comms:

https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1BrvoUyz4SbO_Odc4sTLvFumESJkDQwNS4ZahPu3n36o/edit?gid=0#gid=0

---

# **How do we measure success?**

- Open Rate (Percentage of recipients who open the email)
- Bounce rate (Percentage of emails that were bounced)

---

# **How are others solving this problem?**

‣ 

(Benchmarking + best practices)

---

# **What is the solution?**

| Element | Consideration | Requirement description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Header | Required | All email template should have a common header with the DSP finance logo. Date of communication and a description of the communication |
| Call-to-Action (CTA): | Required | Capabilities to place primary and secondary CTAs in the body of the text, the design should be able to support multiple CTAs for the user to click |
| Action-oriented text (e.g., "Apply Now", "View Statement") | Required | Design should support call to action statements, while there would be CTAs, specific text with weights would be required to draw user attention (outside of CTAs) |
| Contact information: | Required | Specific section which contains contact details of the NBFC (if the user wants to reach back the team)
- Customer support phone number
- Email address
- Address (registered) |
| Footer: | Required | Template should have a footer (contains links to key policies, terms and conditions and disclaimer:

Disclaimer: This is an auto generated email. The details mentioned in this email are for sole use by the recipient and not for circulation. The information contained in this email has not been prepared with any intent for redistribution and is meant for the addressed recipient only. |
| Policies and disclosure / Terms and condition / Grievance redressal | Required | Footer should contain link to the privacy policy
(Link to the respective policies on website) |
| Unsubscribe option (as per regulations) | To be discussed | Not required |
| Social media links | To be discussed | Link to DSP website |
| Customer's account details (if relevant) |  | All communications should contain the client ID as well as their loan account ID (if applicable) |
